instruments.name: Genneia ON Verde Clase XLIX 7,750% 2033 (USD, Ley NY)
instruments.lawDetail: Suplemento de prospecto local (17-nov-2025), seccion 'Ley Aplicable': 'El Contrato de Fideicomiso y las Obligaciones Negociables se regiran por las leyes del Estado de Nueva York', con carve-out de ley argentina para autorizacion/CNV/oferta publica local. Emitida bajo Regimen Simplificado de Emisor Frecuente N°15. Fiduciario UMB Bank, N.A.; representante en Argentina Banco Santander Argentina S.A.
instruments.currencyOfPaymentEvidence: Denominadas, integradas y pagaderas en Dolares Estadounidenses; suscripcion/integracion 'Dolares, en el exterior' (suplemento local); liquidacion por transferencia a cuenta fuera de la Republica Argentina (aviso de resultados, punto k) - international 144A/RegS green notes, BYMA SVS panel.
instruments.issueDetail: VN US$400.000.000 emitido 2025-12-02 a 98,682% (rendimiento 8,000%); ofertas por >US$860M sobre objetivo inicial US$300M. Bono verde alineado a GBP 2021 (ICMA) y Lineamientos SVS de CNV; listado en Panel SVS de BYMA. Compradores iniciales J.P. Morgan, Santander US, BBVA Securities, Balanz UK.

coupon.paymentPattern: Semiannual on Jun 2 and Dec 2, first coupon 2026-06-02, last on maturity 2033-12-02 (aviso de resultados lists every date). Non-business-day payments roll to next business day (BA+NY) without extra accrual, except the final payment date which does accrue if rolled.

instruments.dayCount: 30/360 (suplemento local: 'Los intereses se computaran en base a un año de 360 dias corridos, de 12 meses de 30 dias cada uno')

amortization.note: 3 cuotas anuales y consecutivas 33/33/34 en 2031/2032/2033-12-02 (aviso de resultados, punto j; BYMA ficha 'EN TRES CUOTAS, DOS DE 33% Y LA ULTIMA DE 34%'). NOT bullet.

minDenomination.detail: Denominaciones minimas de US$1.000 y multiplos enteros de US$1.000 (suplemento local); BYMA ficha denominacionMinima=1000. GATES RETAIL SIZING: BYMA orders must be multiples of 1.000 VN.

instruments.quoteBasis: BYMA corp panel, dirty price per 100 VN original; O=ARS, D=USD MEP, C=USD cable (data912 /live/arg_corp 2026-06-10).
instruments.remainingCashflowsNote: Per 100 VN original face, payments strictly after 2026-06-10; coupon 7,75%/2 = 3,875 on outstanding principal (30/360): 2,59625 on 67 residual after 2031-12-02, 1,3175 on 34 residual after 2032-12-02. Coupon of 2026-06-02 already paid. Scheduled dates used; 2028-12-02 (Sat), 2029-06-02 (Sat), 2029-12-02 (Sun), 2030-06-02 (Sun) roll to next business day without extra accrual.

deal counsel: US$400M, 7,75% semiannual, yield 8%, 33/33/34, cable settlement, SVS panel
secondary: IOL title 'ON Clase XLIX 7.75% vto 2033-12-02' (coupon+maturity cross-check)

instruments.confidenceNote: Primary aviso de resultados + suplemento local agree on every term; BYMA ficha and deal counsel corroborate amortization and denominations.
flags: CALLABLE: make-whole (Treasury+50bp) before 2028-12-02; then callable at 103,875% (from 2028-12-02), 101,938% (from 2029-12-02), 100% (from 2030-12-02); up to 35% redeemable at 107,750% with equity proceeds before 2028-12-02. remainingCashflows assume no call.

D-line (MEP) and C-line (cable) closed 105,45 vs 101,20 on 2026-06-10: payments are made offshore (cable-settled bond), so the D price embeds the MEP/CCL spread; yields computed on the C line are the cable-basis yields.
Aviso de resultados prints ratings 'S&P: B2 / Fitch: B-' - 'B2' is not an S&P scale notch (likely typo in the primary doc); ratings not load-bearing for pricing.

checkedSources.what: INDEPENDENT: dirty 105,45 (matches data912 close), clean 105,354, tir/tea 6,8387%, dtm 2731 - consistent ONLY with 33/33/34 amortizer at 30/360
deal summary corroborates 7,75%, 2033, three annual installments, US$400M
